sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Retinal specialists drive clinical progress on modifier gene therapy, Ocugen, Inc. asserts
feed.summary: Ocugen, Inc. has commended retinal specialists for their crucial role in advancing modifier gene therapy through clinical trials and advisory input. These experts are instrumental in developing new treatment options for severe blindness conditions that currently have limited therapies. Ocugen continues to push gene therapy innovations in collaboration with leading medical professionals, having recently accelerated efforts in modifier gene therapies and celebrated women leaders in the field.

feed.title: Norwood Financial team joins networking at PA Association of Community Bankers Topgolf event
feed.summary: Norwood Financial actively participated in the PA Association of Community Bankers' "Swing into Spring" Topgolf event, where their team networked with banking professionals. This event, along with CEO Jim Donnelly's visit to Norwood Investment Corp. and Valerie O’Hare’s participation in the Women in Banking Conference, highlights the company's commitment to staff engagement and industry involvement.

feed.title: Nu Skin (NUS) CFO Chelsea Lantz discloses 42,100-share Class A stake
feed.summary: Nu Skin Enterprises' Chief Financial Officer, Chelsea K. Lantz, has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing her beneficial ownership of 42,100 shares of Class A Common Stock. This filing establishes her equity position as an executive officer. The Form 3 is an initial statement and does not represent a buy or sell transaction.

feed.title: NeuroSense (NASDAQ: NRSN) CTO discloses options, shares and RSU awards
feed.summary: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. CTO Niva Russek-Blum has filed an initial ownership report detailing her equity holdings in the company. The report includes 36,000 fully vested options at an exercise price of $2.18, significant blocks of ordinary shares totaling over 250,000, and 10,000 restricted share units with varying vesting schedules. These disclosures provide transparency regarding the executive's stake in NeuroSense.

feed.title: NeuroSense (NRSN) CTO awarded 200,000 restricted shares vesting over two years
feed.summary: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. (NRSN) Chief Technology Officer Niva Russek-Blum was granted 200,000 restricted Ordinary Shares as compensation. These shares, with a stated price of $0.00 per share, will vest in equal quarterly installments over a two-year period beginning March 26, 2026, contingent on her continued service. This grant increases her direct holdings to 467,953 Ordinary Shares and is subject to Section 102 of the Israeli Tax Ordinance for certain tax benefits.

feed.title: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) Hits New 52-Week Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) recently hit a new 52-week low, trading as low as $63.72, down about 2.1%. Analyst sentiment has shifted to mixed-to-negative, with an average "Reduce" rating and a $100 consensus price target, and some firms cutting ratings and targets. Despite beating EPS expectations, revenue declined 1.2% year-over-year, although large institutions have increased their stakes.

feed.title: Baird Upgrades Novanta(NOVT.US) to Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $144
feed.summary: Baird has upgraded Novanta (NOVT.US) from Neutral to an Outperform (Buy) rating, while simultaneously cutting its price target to $144 from $155. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the company's stock despite a reduced price expectation.

feed.title: NIQ Global Intelligence (NYSE: NIQ) seeks ratification of EY, say-on-pay and capital reduction
feed.summary: NIQ Global Intelligence (NYSE: NIQ) will hold its 2026 Annual General Meeting on May 21, 2026, in Dublin. Shareholders are asked to vote on the election of four Class I directors, the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and advisory votes on executive compensation and its frequency. Additionally, the company seeks approval for share repurchase authority, treasury re-allotment pricing, and a capital reduction to create distributable reserves, which requires the Irish High Court's confirmation.

feed.title: Neumora tops Q4 earnings forecasts as pipeline advances, shares slip
feed.summary: The article indicates that Neumora exceeded fourth-quarter earnings forecasts, driven by progress in its pipeline. Despite the positive financial performance and pipeline advancements, the company's shares experienced a decline.

feed.title: Neumora Therapeutics: Downgrading After Navacaprant Development Setback (NASDAQ:NMRA)
feed.summary: Neumora Therapeutics has been downgraded from 'Strong Buy' to 'Hold' following the failure of its KOASTAL-1 study for navacaprant in Major Depressive Disorder (MDD). Although enrollment for KOASTAL-2 and KOASTAL-3 studies in MDD has increased with topline data expected in Q2 2026, success is uncertain. The company's NMRA-511 showed a promising signal for Alzheimer's Disease agitation in a Phase 1b study, particularly in patients with elevated anxiety, but a Phase 2 study is not anticipated until Q1 2027, delaying near-term value realization.

feed.title: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) director sells 3,644 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Cloudflare director John Graham-Cumming exercised stock options for 2,520 Class A shares at $44.72 and subsequently sold 3,644 shares in open-market transactions at weighted average prices between approximately $200 and $204 per share. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on May 28, 2025. After these transactions, Graham-Cumming retains a substantial direct holding of 494,067 Class A shares in Cloudflare.

feed.title: Natural Grocers Holds Virtual Hiring Event for Nutritional Health Coaching Roles
feed.summary: Natural Grocers is hosting a virtual hiring event on April 1st for over 30 nutritional health coaching positions nationwide. The company is unique as the only national grocery chain providing full-time in-store nutrition coaches. Successful candidates must have a degree or certification in a related field and will undergo extensive training, including 160 hours of ongoing education, along with receiving attractive benefits.

feed.title: [ARS] NATURAL HEALTH TRENDS CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Natural Health Trends Corp (NHTC) on March 30, 2026. The filing is categorized as having a low impact and neutral sentiment. It also provides an overview of NHTC's stock data, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Neurocrine Biosciences Inc (NBIX) Shares Down 3.14% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences Inc (NBIX) shares dropped 3.14% on March 30, trading at $128.30 after touching an intraday low of $128.02. This price is 19.90% below its 52-week high but 52.32% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts maintain an "Outperform" rating with an average target price of $176.27, suggesting a potential upside of 37.39%, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $207.07.

feed.title: Nomadar Corp. Secures New Private Equity Financing
feed.summary: Nomadar Corp. recently secured an additional $1.738 million through a private placement, bringing its total recent capital raised to about $7.13 million. This new funding, part of a broader commitment from Sport City Cádiz, will support the expansion of Nomadar's global sports development platform and key infrastructure projects like the JP Financial Arena. The investment reflects growing investor confidence in Nomadar's integrated model for elite athlete development and fan engagement.

feed.title: Kindly MD Inc options imply 0.9% move in share price post-earnings
feed.summary: Pre-earnings option trading for Kindly MD Inc indicates a potential 0.9% movement in its share price. Call options are significantly outpacing puts, with implied volatility suggesting a minor 0c shift after earnings. Historically, the median share price move for the company post-earnings has been 1.8%.

feed.title: Maris-Tech (NASDAQ: MTEK) signs $3,007,329 at-the-market share deal
feed.summary: Maris-Tech Ltd. (NASDAQ: MTEK) has entered into a Sales Agreement with A.G.P./Alliance Global Partners for an at-the-market (ATM) offering of up to $3,007,329 of its ordinary shares. The company plans to use the net proceeds from these sales for working capital and general corporate purposes. Maris-Tech is not obligated to sell any shares and will pay the Sales Agent a 3.0% commission on aggregate gross proceeds.

feed.title: Tamara Lee Brown Buys 10,000 Shares of New Found Gold (CVE:NFG) Stock
feed.summary: New Found Gold director Tamara Lee Brown purchased 10,000 shares of the company's stock on March 30th at C$2.42 per share, totaling C$24,200, which increased her ownership by 149.25% to 16,700 shares. The stock traded at C$2.40 on Monday, with a market capitalization of C$828.51 million. New Found Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold deposits in Newfoundland and Labrador and Ontario, holding 100% interest in the Queensway project.

feed.title: MSGM SEC Filings - Motorsport Games Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Motorsport Games Inc. (MSGM) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, detailing financial results, corporate governance, and insider activities. Recent filings highlight major shareholder disclosures, insider trading under Rule 10b5-1 plans, securing a revolving credit line, and Q3 2025 financial results. The platform offers AI-powered summaries for quick insights into these regulatory documents.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal (MT) posts 2025 parent financials and $61.4B revenue
feed.summary: ArcelorMittal has published its 2025 statutory financial statements for the parent company, reporting $61.4 billion in revenue. In 2025, the company produced 55.6 million metric tonnes of crude steel and 48.8 million tonnes of iron ore. ArcelorMittal operates in 60 countries with primary steelmaking operations in 14 countries, serving various industries including automotive and construction.

feed.title: Pool Corp. Hits New 52-Week Low at USD 197.15 Amid Decline
feed.summary: Pool Corp. has reached a new 52-week low of USD 197.15, marking a significant decline of 41.96% over the past year, contrasting with the S&P 500's gain. Despite challenges like decreased profits, the company maintains a strong return on equity and manageable debt levels. This consistent underperformance against the S&P 500 raises questions about its market position.

feed.title: ServiceNow Expands AI Reach: Carahsoft Partnership and BNP Paribas Confidence Surge
feed.summary: ServiceNow's stock surged by over 6% following a strategic partnership with Carahsoft, aiming to expand its AI offerings across the U.S. and Canada, and an upgrade by BNP Paribas from Neutral to Outperform with a $140 price target. This collaboration is expected to deepen ServiceNow's reach into various sectors beyond government, leveraging Carahsoft's extensive reseller network. The company's robust financial performance and strategic moves are positioning it for continued market leadership and growth in the AI solutions space.

feed.title: Q3 2025 Fidelity National Information Services Inc Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: This article provides the Q3 2025 earnings call transcript for Fidelity National Information Services Inc (FIS). The company reported strong Q3 results, exceeding expectations with adjusted revenue growth of 6.3% and adjusted EPS up 8% year over year, and increased its share repurchase target to $1.3 billion. Key positive points include sequential margin improvement and leveraging AI for financial services, while negative points note the stable but not substantially increasing pricing environment and uncertainties from the Worldpay separation and bank consolidation.

feed.title: Entergy Corp. Hits Day High with Strong 6.82% Intraday Surge
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. demonstrated strong stock performance with a 6.82% gain on March 27, 2026, and significantly outperformed the S&P 500 across various timeframes, including a 30.78% annual return. Despite positive short-term trends and robust quarterly profits, the company faces long-term fundamental weaknesses like a low Return on Capital Employed and a high Debt to EBITDA ratio. The stock reached an intraday high of USD 111.97, reflecting strong market activity and resilience amidst fluctuating conditions.

feed.title: Corteva, Inc. Experiences Valuation Adjustment Amid Strong Market Performance and Competitive Positioning
feed.summary: Corteva, Inc. has seen a recent valuation adjustment, with its price currently at $81.99 after a slight decrease from its previous close. The company has demonstrated strong performance over the past year, achieving a 31.31% return, significantly outperforming the S&P 500. Key financial metrics include a P/E ratio of 43, an EV to EBITDA ratio of 14.05, a PEG ratio of 7.64, and a notable dividend yield of 94.80%, indicating healthy growth and a competitive position in the Chemicals & Petrochemicals sector.

feed.title: Morpheus Research report alleges 'anti-competitive' practices by MakeMyTrip despite CCI order
feed.summary: Morpheus Research, an activist short-seller, has released a report accusing MakeMyTrip of continuing anti-competitive practices, specifically price parity arrangements with hotel partners, despite a 2022 penalty from the Competition Commission of India (CCI). The report also alleges accounting irregularities, an undisclosed CCI investigation due in early 2026, and misleading financial metrics. MakeMyTrip has not yet responded to these allegations.

feed.title: Realty Income prices $800M senior notes offering at 4.75%
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) has priced an $800 million public offering of senior unsecured notes due April 15, 2033, with a 4.750% coupon and a yield to maturity of 5.047%. The company also executed a cross-currency swap to achieve an effective blended yield of 4.44%, intending to use the proceeds for general corporate purposes including debt repayment and property acquisitions. This comes as the company maintains a "GOOD" financial health score despite its stock appearing overvalued according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: News Corp Details US$1 Billion Share Repurchase Plan, Excluding ASX CDIs
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This initiative aims to provide capital management flexibility and potentially enhance per-share metrics, while explicitly excluding ASX-listed CDIs. The program reflects the company's confidence in its valuation and capital strategy.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp. Hits New 52-Week High at USD 171.23
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. reached a new 52-week high of USD 171.23 on March 27, 2026, marking a 51.21% increase over the past year and outperforming the S&P 500. The company boasts a market capitalization of approximately USD 1.25 trillion, a P/E ratio of 42.00, and a low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.12, reflecting strong financial health and effective management despite a 0.00% dividend yield.

feed.title: Trimble, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Industry Dynamics
feed.summary: Trimble, Inc., a small-cap software products company, has undergone a valuation adjustment with a P/E ratio of 35 and a price-to-book value of 2.67. The company's stock performance shows a year-to-date return of -19.63% and a 10-year return of 156.71%, lagging the S&P 500. This evaluation highlights Trimble's competitive position within the software products sector compared to peers like Dynatrace, Inc., Bentley Systems, Inc., and Paycom Software, Inc.

feed.title: Prologis, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. has recently undergone a stock valuation adjustment, featuring a P/E ratio of 38, a price-to-book value of 2.40, a return on capital employed of 6.56%, and a dividend yield of 3.72%. The company maintains a competitive position within the realty sector compared to peers like Welltower, Inc. and Equinix, Inc., which have higher valuations, and Simon Property Group, Inc., which has more moderate metrics. This reevaluation highlights Prologis' financial standing and market competitiveness in the realty industry.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Declares Quarterly Dividends on Pre
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) has announced quarterly cash dividends for its Series I and Series L Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stocks. The Series I preferred stock will pay $356.25 per share ($0.35625 per depositary share) on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record by May 15, 2026. The Series L preferred stock will pay $343.75 per share ($0.34375 per depositary share) on May 20, 2026, to shareholders as of April 30, 2026.

feed.title: MillerKnoll (MLKN) Q3 2026: revenue grows 6% as EPS turns positive
feed.summary: MillerKnoll (MLKN) reported strong Q3 2026 results with net sales up 5.8% to $926.6 million and dilute EPS turning positive to $0.34 from a year-ago loss. All segments saw revenue growth, driven by price increases, increased sales volumes, and favorable currency translation. The company's profitability rebound was significantly aided by the absence of prior-year non-cash impairment charges, although adjusted diluted EPS slightly decreased.

feed.title: MillerKnoll Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Results
feed.summary: MillerKnoll Inc. reported solid third-quarter fiscal year 2026 results with net sales up 5.8% and orders up 9.2%, driven by growth in North America Contract and Global Retail segments. The company's operating margin improved significantly year-over-year, and it maintained strong liquidity, declaring a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1875 per share. CEO Andi Owen highlighted the strength of their diversified portfolio and their focus on disciplined execution and operational priorities despite macroeconomic uncertainties.

feed.title: MNDY Investor Alert: monday.com Ltd. Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against monday.com Ltd. (NASDAQ: MNDY). The lawsuit alleges the company overstated its revenue trajectory by projecting $1.8 billion in revenue by fiscal year 2027, only to retract this target less than five months later. This led to a significant drop in MNDY's stock price, and investors who suffered losses may be entitled to compensation with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 11, 2026.

feed.title: Moelis & Co (NYSE: MC) COO granted additional dividend-equivalent RSUs
feed.summary: Moelis & Co Chief Operating Officer Katherine Pilcher Ciafone was granted additional dividend-equivalent RSUs as part of her equity compensation. She received 16.48 2021 incentive RSUs and 46.89 2022 incentive RSUs, which will vest concurrently with her existing unvested incentive RSUs. These awards are routine compensation and not open-market transactions.

feed.title: AI Investing Insights - Official Homepage - Intellectia AI™
feed.summary: This page from Intellectia AI provides an overview for the MIY ETF, including its price data, a brief navigation to technical analysis and news, and mentions Intellectia AI as a platform for winning trades. The site also lists various AI-powered tools and market analysis features offered by Intellectia AI. It appears to be a company page rather than a detailed article.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds Ramaco Resources, Inc. Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit with a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of March 31, 2026 - METC
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has notified investors of Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that defendants made false statements and concealed information regarding the development progress at the Brook Mine, impacting investors who suffered losses between July 31, 2025, and October 23, 2025. Investors have until March 31, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff, with no out-of-pocket costs to participate.

feed.title: Veradermics (NYSE: MANE) bets on oral minoxidil for pattern hair loss
feed.summary: Veradermics (NYSE: MANE) is a late clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing VDPHL01, an extended-release oral minoxidil for treating pattern hair loss (PHL) in both men and women. The company is conducting three registration-directed, placebo-controlled trials for VDPHL01. Veradermics estimates the U.S. PHL treatment market at approximately $9 billion annually and plans a cash-pay, multi-channel commercial strategy, leveraging its patent protection expected to extend into at least 2043.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) director Echevarria granted 1,710 Phantom Stock Units as deferred pay
feed.summary: Pfizer director Joseph Echevarria has been granted 1,710.429 Phantom Stock Units as deferred compensation, valued at $27.04 per unit. This grant increases his total phantom unit balance to 153,398.145 units. These units will be settled in cash or common stock at his election upon his retirement from the Board of Directors, representing a form of non-dilutive compensation that aligns director incentives with shareholder value.

feed.title: Director at Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) receives phantom stock unit grant
feed.summary: Pfizer director Cyrus Taraporevala was granted 1,386.834 phantom stock units, valued at $27.04 per unit, bringing his total holdings to 27,139.547 units. These units are part of deferred director compensation, including dividend equivalents, and will be settled in cash or common stock upon his retirement from the Board. This transaction is classified as a compensation and deferral event rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc (KVUE) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides current stock price information and trading conditions for Kenvue Inc. (KVUE), the consumer health spin-off of Johnson & Johnson. It outlines CFD trading details such as spread, overnight funding adjustments, and commission, alongside key financial stats like previous close and 1-year change. The company is highlighted for its iconic brands and stable cash flows.

feed.title: Seeking Shields from Volatility? 2 Stocks Worth a Look
feed.summary: Amidst recent stock market volatility, particularly affecting tech stocks, Zacks Investment Research suggests focusing on stable, less flashy businesses like Hershey (HSY) and PepsiCo (PEP). Both companies have outperformed the S&P 500 in 2026, boast strong earnings outlooks and consistent dividend payouts, making them attractive options for investors seeking stability. These "boring" stocks provide a shield against market fluctuations through their established business models and shareholder returns.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc (GEHC) Stock Price Down 3.23% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Shares of GE HealthCare Technologies Inc (GEHC) dropped 3.23% on March 30, closing at $69.23. This is 22.88% below its 52-week high but 20.09% above its 52-week low. Analysts forecast an average target price of $93.12 for GEHC, implying a 34.50% upside, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $88.97, suggesting a 28.51% upside.

feed.title: Entergy Corp (ETR) Shares Up 6.82% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Entergy Corp (ETR) shares rose by 6.82% on March 30, closing at $109.88. This places the stock just below its 52-week high, with significantly higher than average trading volume. Wall Street analysts maintain an "Outperform" rating with an average price target of $110.44, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $64.87, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: ConnectM Delays Annual 10-K Filing Briefly
feed.summary: ConnectM Technology Solutions has announced a delay in filing its annual Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The delay is attributed to needing additional time for financial close documentation, and the company expects to file within the 15-day extension period, anticipating no major changes in its financial results. An analyst currently rates CNTM as a Hold with a $0.40 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, also provides a Neutral rating, citing challenging financial performance balanced by positive technical indicators.

feed.title: [Form 4] Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. (MCB) executive Scott Lublin, EVP and Chief Lending Officer, had 3,025 shares of common stock withheld to cover tax withholding obligations. These shares were valued at $80.65 each. Following this transaction, Lublin directly holds 57,905 shares of common stock, which includes various tranches of restricted stock units.

feed.title: Entergy Corporation (ETR) Announces Leadership Transition with New Chief Accounting Officer Patrick J. Stack to Succeed Reginald T. Jackson as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer
feed.summary: Entergy Corporation (ETR) has announced that Reginald T. Jackson, current Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, will retire on May 31, 2026. Patrick J. Stack, age 53, who has served as Corporate Controller since March 2022, will succeed him as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer starting June 1, 2026. Stack will receive an annual base salary of $356,000, along with eligibility for a 45% annual cash bonus and various stock awards.

feed.title: Assessing Verizon (VZ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Debt Concerns
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) has experienced mixed recent share price performance, with a small daily decline alongside positive monthly and quarterly returns, bringing its current share price to $50.30. Despite a widely followed narrative suggesting it is undervalued with a fair value estimate around $50.76, concerns exist regarding high network investment and its US$116 billion net unsecured debt. Investors are advised to review the data themselves, focusing on key risks and rewards, and consider other investment opportunities beyond just telecom stocks.

feed.title: 157,943 stock options granted to Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) CEO
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co (NYSE: TAP) CEO, Rahul Goyal, was granted 157,943 Employee Stock Options for Class B Common Stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. This grant is a correction to a previous filing, rectifying a calculation error. The options will vest in full on March 4, 2029, and expire on March 4, 2036, representing a compensation-related award rather than an open-market transaction.
